title: Plushiefy
description: a mod made to turn all my friends into marketable plushies!
body:
A mod that adds a variety of plushies into the game.
Plushies can be right clicked for funny voicelines.
all plushies can be crafted using 1 wool in a stonecutter (see in the galery).
Thanks to Hstar747 for making all the plushie models.

**now get these marketable plushies before THEY GET YOU**
